text: What if your genes care more about your family than you? This is inclusive fitness, a key concept in evolutionary biology. It suggests that helping relatives can boost your own genetic success. Studies show animals often sacrifice for their kin, ensuring shared genes survive. But not all scientists agree. The debate is ongoing and complex. So, is it all about blood ties or something deeper? Want to dive deeper? Hit like and follow for more science insights!
